Fixed: gql-variable block now correctly pairs with its own gql-query in multi-request files separated by request-separator
Adding a new gql-variable block no longer updates the first gql-variable of another request
Editing a gql-query now immediately reflects variable changes in its paired gql-variable block
Schema viewer no longer crashes with circular type references — gracefully falls back to an error message
flushSync warning eliminated when inserting a new GraphQL query block
Remove catch-all shim from build pipeline for correct dependency bundling
Removed catch-all shim block that caused runtime import errors for bundled dependencies

title: Initial Release
description: GraphQL plugin for Voiden with introspection, variables, and schema explorer.
